items.sceneLine2: six notes still left to write
items.quote: The session is over, but the paperwork keeps slipping to the next day.
items.desc: Turn session recordings and rough notes into a ready-to-review session note draft.

items.cat: The counselor stuck connecting assessment to session
items.quote: I have the test scores, but I don't know how to connect them to what actually happened in the room.
items.desc: Bring assessment results and session records together into a draft integrated interpretation.

items.quote: I can't figure out what the core case question even is.
items.desc: Organize case conceptualization and supervision questions from session patterns and recurring cues.

items.cat: The counselor locked into institutional forms
items.quote: The session content is the same, but the submission template is always different.
items.desc: Reformat session records to fit institutional and reporting templates.

items.cat: The counselor mapping complex family systems
items.sceneLine2: to see the whole picture at once
items.quote: I can sense the relational dynamics, but putting them into a structure is hard.
items.desc: Organize family cues and relational information into a genogram-centered summary.

markerPurpose: Branch by the 'moment you get stuck', not job title · 5 equal-weight cards · self-matching
